concept: Drawers: This puzzle game challenges players to organize household items by sorting, stacking, and arranging them into neat patterns or logical groups within various drawers and spaces. Each puzzle presents a unique set of disorganized items, and players must deduce the "correct" arrangement, which often involves subtle visual cues, logical sequencing, or completing a pattern, with some puzzles having multiple valid solutions.
name: A Little to the Left: Drawers
